name: Alexandra Chen
title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
summary:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Passionate about developer tooling, performance optimization, and clean architecture.

Led engineering teams at two venture-backed startups, delivering products that served over 2M users. Strong advocate for TypeScript, test-driven development, and inclusive engineering culture.

experience.content: Lead the platform team building the core orchestration engine for a cloud-native deployment platform.
bulletPoints: Architected a real-time event pipeline processing 50K+ events/sec using Kafka and Node.js
Reduced P95 API latency by 60% through query optimization and CDN caching strategy
Mentored 4 junior engineers via weekly code reviews and pair programming sessions
achievements: Shipped v2.0 of the platform, increasing annual recurring revenue by 35%
Received company-wide Impact Award for leading the monolith-to-microservices migration

experience.content: Core contributor on the frontend platform team, building shared component libraries and design system tooling.
bulletPoints: Built a React component library adopted by 12 product teams across the organization
Implemented end-to-end testing infrastructure with Playwright, achieving 90% coverage
Designed a GraphQL API gateway that unified 5 legacy backend services
achievements: Open-sourced the component library, garnering 2.5K GitHub stars
Reduced frontend build times from 12min to 45s with incremental builds and esbuild

experience.content: Early engineering hire at an early-stage startup building a collaborative data visualization platform.

projects.name: Kite
projects.description: A lightweight CLI tool for scaffolding TypeScript monorepos with opinionated defaults for ESLint, Prettier, and Vitest.

projects.name: Harbor CMS
projects.description: Headless CMS platform with real-time collaboration, built for content teams at scale.
